## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat: add X`, `fix: correct Y`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new/changed behavior
- [ ] All checks pass locally (`./scripts/test.sh`, `./scripts/format.sh`, `./scripts/typecheck.sh`)
- [ ] Lockfiles regenerated if `requirements.txt` or `requirements-dev.txt` changed (`./scripts/compile-deps.sh`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed
